tagline: Build a real product using AI in 3 hours.
subTagline: No experience needed. Just show up.

tracks.title: Campus AI
tracks.subtitle: Build a tool to solve a student's pain points
tracks.desc: Study planner, resume builder, email assistant, personal organizer for homework/projects/life tasks

tracks.title: Startup AI
tracks.subtitle: Build something to kick start your business
tracks.desc: Marketing tool, content generator, pricing engine, 90-day ideation tool for startup activities

tracks.title: Working Toward My Future
tracks.subtitle: Build a tool to help you get hired
tracks.desc: AI-powered job finder, career path evaluator, personal CRM, AI proficiency demo app

schedule.title: Doors Open & Kickoff
schedule.desc: Check in, grab pizza, meet your team, and get set up with AI tools.

schedule.title: Build Sprint Begins
schedule.desc: Teams start building. Describe your ideas to AI and watch them come to life.

schedule.title: Pencils Down
schedule.desc: Finish up your projects and prepare a 2-minute demo.

schedule.title: Demo Showcase
schedule.desc: Each team presents their product to the judges and audience.

schedule.title: Prizes & Wrap-Up
schedule.desc: Winners announced. Prizes awarded. Network and celebrate.
